action_functional.composition_law: compose operators in packet_archive_tensor_frame_pair_region bases, then remeasure interaction terms instead of assuming independent delta additivity
action_functional.operator_semantics: each materializer is an operator T with receiver R_T; evaluate S(T)=delta_segnet(R_T(T(a)))+delta_posenet(R_T(T(a)))+lambda_rate*delta_archive_bytes(T(a))

waterfill_solver.rebrotli_policy: after every receiver-consumed rate transform, enqueue packet_member_recompress_v1 or section Brotli retune where the runtime proof keeps payload semantics fixed

stack_candidates.rationale: measure global color_geometry calibration before spending bytes on localized SegNet/PoseNet region repair
separate pair-frame motion repair from frame0 color calibration before trusting either marginal alone
let inverse-scorer cells propose basis directions, then test nearby chroma/luma/RGB repair atoms under MLX
test whether full-video residual budget movement composes with localized component repair instead of increasing distortion

mlx_cpu_drift_summary.interpretation: absolute MLX-vs-local-CPU offsets may be nonzero; paired candidate-vs-reference delta drift is the MLX acquisition quality signal for receiver-closed rate attacks
